examples.title: Pseudocode: Android SDK Tools
examples.description: Demonstrates the usage of Android SDK tools
examples.code:
BEGIN
 INITIALIZE Android SDK
 SET UP SDK Manager
 SET UP AVD Manager
 SET UP ADB
 COMPILE source code WITH javac
 CONVERT .class files TO .dex files WITH d8
 PACKAGE resources WITH aapt2
 SIGN APK WITH debug/release key
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step pseudocode for the Android SDK tools usage

examples.title: Python: Android SDK Tools
examples.description: Demonstrates the usage of Android SDK tools using Python
examples.code:
import subprocess

# Set up SDK Manager
subprocess.run(['sdkmanager', '--list'])

# Set up AVD Manager
subprocess.run(['avdmanager', 'create', 'avd', '-n', 'my_avd', '-k', 'system-images;android-30;google_apis;x86'])

# Compile source code with javac
subprocess.run(['javac', '*.java'])

# Convert .class files to .dex files with d8
d8_command = ['d8', '*.class']
subprocess.run(d8_command)

# Package resources with aapt2
subprocess.run(['aapt2', 'package', '-f', '--output', 'output.apk', '*.xml'])
examples.explanation: Python code snippet demonstrating the usage of Android SDK tools
